series_metadata.series_description: Applications, contracts and all correspondence from applicants and recipients.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain applications, contracts and correspondence from awardees and institutions in office until service commitment is met and full award is disbursed, then destroy. Retain applications, contracts and correspondence from non-awardees and institutions in office for 3 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Data entry of payment history and any refunds for awardees, retain until service commitment is met and full award is disbursed, then destroy. Data entry for non-awardees, retain for 3 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
